name: eu-ai-act-compliance-checker
description: MCP Server to verify EU AI Act and GDPR compliance for AI projects
author: ArkForge

tools.name: scan_project
tools.description: Scan a project to detect AI model usage (OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace, TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain, Gemini, Mistral, Cohere, Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Ollama, LlamaIndex, Replicate, Groq)

project_path.description: Absolute path to the project to scan

tools.name: check_compliance
tools.description: Check EU AI Act compliance for a given risk category

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate a complete EU AI Act compliance report in JSON format

tools.name: suggest_risk_category
tools.description: Suggest the appropriate EU AI Act risk category based on project analysis

tools.name: generate_compliance_templates
tools.description: Generate EU AI Act compliance document templates (technical documentation, risk management plan, transparency notice)

tools.name: validate_api_key
tools.description: Validate an API key for the Pro tier

tools.name: gdpr_scan_project
tools.description: Scan a project to detect personal data processing patterns (GDPR): PII fields, database queries, cookies, tracking, analytics, consent mechanisms, encryption, data deletion

project_path.description: Absolute path to the project to scan

tools.name: gdpr_check_compliance
tools.description: Check GDPR compliance for a project based on its data processing role

tools.name: gdpr_generate_report
tools.description: Generate a complete GDPR compliance report with data processing scan, compliance checks, and recommendations

tools.name: gdpr_generate_templates
tools.description: Generate GDPR compliance document templates (privacy policy, DPIA, records of processing, data breach procedure)

tools.name: combined_compliance_report
tools.description: Generate a combined EU AI Act + GDPR compliance report for AI projects processing personal data

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Get information about free and Pro tier pricing and limits
